name: Vegan Eggnog
recipeIngredient: 2 packages of silken tofu (10 oz each)
16 ounces vanilla soymilk or rice milk
1/2 to 1 cup rum or brandy, optional nutmeg
recipeInstructions:
1. In a blender or food processor, combine the tofu, soymilk, additional vanilla extract, granulated sugar, brown sugar, and turmeric.
2. Blend thoroughly until smooth, stopping occasionally to scrape down the sides of the container.
3. Pour in the rum or brandy (if using) and stir gently.
4. Chill the mixture well before serving.
5. Dust with nutmeg just before serving. Serves about 8.
